name: SakuttoWorks-Agent-Commerce-OS-Catalog
description: The official MCP catalog for Sakutto Works Agent-Commerce-OS. Provides middleware tools for RAG pipeline integration, web data normalization, and system health monitoring.

tools.name: fetch_structured_content
tools.description: Core Normalization Tool. Retrieves content from specific topics or URLs and converts raw HTML into RAG-optimized Markdown/JSON. Removes web noise for LLM ingestion.

target_topic.description: The specific subject, URL, or technical query to normalize.

format_mode.description: Data extraction density. 'comprehensive' includes full technical documentation scraping.

tools.name: get_system_status
tools.description: Retrieves real-time operational status, latency metrics, and API quota usage of the Agent-Commerce-OS infrastructure.

tools.name: extract_domain_metadata
tools.description: Parses structured data (Schema.org, OpenGraph, Table Data) from domain-specific sources. Returns raw entity metrics without interpretation.

entity_identifier.description: The unique identifier (e.g., Code, ID, Name) for the target entity to extract.

source_filter.description: Optional filter for specific data types (e.g., 'metadata', 'tables', 'headers').
